title: Trump UFO Speech Claim Collapses as Alleged Insider Source Denies Contact, Exposing Explosive Leak as False
description: Explore how a sensational claim about a UFO disclosure speech involving Donald Trump was debunked, highlighting issues of credibility in the UFO research community.

title: "Battlefields & Beyond: UFO Encounters in the Vietnam Era"
description: Mike Vara welcomes PAUL RUEZ to Late Night in the Midlands to discuss "Battlefields & Beyond: UFO Encounters in the Vietnam Era. The Late Night in the Midlands show is available at 10 pm Eastern Monday - Wednesday, Friday & some [...]

title: Forget little green men: J.D. Vance expects UFO files will show demons, not aliens
description: Vice President J.D. Vance has a theory about those government UFO files that goes beyond the tinfoil hat crowd: forget aliens, think demons. Mr. Vance has not reviewed the cache of government files on aliens and unidentified aerial phenomena that President Trump ordered released in February — but he does not ...

title: Passionate about the UFO issue, Vance says he has a theory that “aliens are demons”
description: The vice president said in a podcast that he had previously planned trips to Area 51, the top-secret military installation in the Nevada desert, one of the focal points of the alien conspiracy theories The post Passionate about the UFO issue, Vance says he has a theory that “aliens are demons” appeared first on ProtoThema English .

title: JD Vance Joins UFO Discourse: 'I Don't Think They're Aliens. I Think They're Demons,' He Says in New Podcast
description: Vice President JD Vance tells Benny Johnson that UFOs are 'demons' rather than extraterrestrials. Vance vows to access classified files and visit Area 51 following President Trump's disclosure order.
